properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From the struggle there will come triumph, You are strong in my weakness, Out of pain, I see rejoicing, For You rise out of brokenness, For You rise out of brokenness.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will dance in the midst of the fire, I will sing in the eye of the storm, I will shout: You are faithful forever! The victory's mine 'cause the battle is Yours!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From the valley there will come breakthrough, Hope will rise with our praises, Out of trials, You bring redemption, You give beauty for ashes.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Give thanks to the Lord, He is good, He is good, Hodu L'Adonai Ki Tov

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will dance in the midst of the fire, I will sing in the eye of the storm, I will shout: You are faithful forever! The victory's mine 'cause the battle is Yours! The victory's mine 'cause the battle is Yours! The victory's mine 'cause the battle is Yours!
